subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! Be ye of such a station and rank that the affairs of this world shall not withhold you from the Lord of Earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الله کونوا علی مقام و شان لایشغلکم شئونات الدنیا عن مالک الارض
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
